task_completion.description: Verify the 'Federal Aviation Administration' supplier was created with the correct email.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Suppliers list or detail view, a supplier named 'Federal Aviation Administration' is visible with the email 'UAShelp@faa.gov'.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Total Flight Hours' custom field was created and added to the 'UAV Metadata' fieldset.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Custom Fields or Fieldsets view, a numeric field named 'Total Flight Hours' is visible and is shown as associated with the 'UAV Metadata' fieldset.

task_completion.description: Verify the Total Flight Hours were updated for all four drones.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Assets list or individual asset detail views, the 'Total Flight Hours' field shows 154 for DRONE-001, 89 for DRONE-002, 312 for DRONE-003, and 41 for DRONE-004.

task_completion.description: Verify the status of DRONE-003 was changed to 'Out for Repair'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Assets list or the DRONE-003 detail view, the status label for DRONE-003 is explicitly set to 'Out for Repair'.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Annual FAA Registration' maintenance records were logged for all four drones.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Asset Maintenances view, there are 'Annual FAA Registration' records (Type: Maintenance) for DRONE-001, DRONE-002, DRONE-003, and DRONE-004, showing Supplier 'Federal Aviation Administration', Start/Completion dates of '2026-03-08', and a cost of '$5.00'.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Repair' maintenance record was logged for DRONE-003.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Asset Maintenances view or DRONE-003's maintenance history, a 'Gimbal and Rotor Replacement' record (Type: Repair) is visible with Supplier 'DJI Enterprise Support', Start Date '2026-03-05', Cost '$450.00', and notes mentioning 'Drone struck tree branch. Awaiting replacement parts.'

integrity.description: Verifies the agent used the Snipe-IT web interface rather than terminal commands or API scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Snipe-IT web application in a browser, with evidence of clicking, typing, or navigating through the UI.

integrity.description: Verifies the agent interacted with the actual Snipe-IT application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Snipe-IT interface is visible, not a notepad, terminal, or mock HTML page where the agent just typed the expected answers.

integrity.description: Verifies the agent entered the data into the correct Snipe-IT forms.
integrity.visual_evidence: The data (e.g., flight hours, maintenance details) is visible in the appropriate tables, forms, or detail views within Snipe-IT, not just typed into a search bar or unrelated text field.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected flight hours: DRONE-001 (154), DRONE-002 (89), DRONE-003 (312), DRONE-004 (41). Expected supplier name: 'Federal Aviation Administration'. Expected supplier email: 'UAShelp@faa.gov'.
